entries.description: Registered S1 (claude/anthropic/opus-4.8/high); read spec, verdict, moduleAuthoring.ts, cancelLifecycle.ts, fileSystem.ts, assignLegacySets.ts command.

Confirmed prereq Set 098 complete (both sessions) + Creates present (scaffoldModuleLifecycleSets, config.kind); appended ai-assignment.md; routed Session-2 recommendation (gemini-pro, $0.0017) -> claude/anthropic/sonnet-5/low saved to s1-next-set-analysis.json.

Implemented renameModule(root,oldSlug,{newSlug?,newTitle?}) in moduleAuthoring.ts: preflight (validate+declared-uniqueness+undeclared-history collision+no-running-session), format-preserving restampModuleInSpecText + rewriteManifestEntryText with parse-after guards, all-or-nothing apply with rollback, title-only skips restamp.
Added dabbler.renameModule palette command (renameModule.ts, injectable UI, two-step modal confirm enumerating N restamped sets); wired into extension.ts + package.json contribution.

Added rename test matrices (restamp unit, preflight matrix, apply 0/1/N + title-only + slug+title, rollback on injected failure, format preservation) + command-flow tests. 126/126 targeted pass; full suite 1694 pass / 27 electron-only fail (tree render/watchers/worktree — none rename-related).

tsc --noEmit clean; eslint clean; esbuild compile clean. Dogfood on scratch multi-module repo: greeter->welcomer regrouped 2 stamped sets, payments+unstamped untouched, ZERO orphans, comments/codeRoots/sibling entries byte-preserved (s1-dogfood.md). Layer2 electron harness env-broken (VS Code 1.128.0 rejects test-electron CLI flags); ran via sanctioned vscode-stub path.

Mandatory cross-provider phased verification: discovery K=2 fan-out (both gpt-5-6, anthropic excluded) -> VERIFIED/VERIFIED, 0 Critical/Major, $0.41 (s1-verification.md + s1-verification-fanout-2.md). Both converged on nits; folded in 2 genuine ones (title-less slug-only rename refusal; CRLF title-insert) with tests, corrected doc test-count; remaining nits adjudicated by-design in disposition. Non-blocking round -> effectively VERIFIED, loop stopped.

Authored disposition.json (status completed, verification_verdict VERIFIED, next_orchestrator claude/anthropic/sonnet-5/low switch-due-to-cost per routed analysis); updated ai-assignment Actuals. Ready to commit+push+close_session.
